name: Ant Design
description: Enterprise-class UI design language and React component library with comprehensive features

description.value: Enterprise-class UI design language and React component library with comprehensive features

active-maintenance.comment: Actively maintained; v6.1.1 released December 15, 2024; 31,137 commits with 2,346 contributors; regular releases

initial-release.comment: Repository created April 24, 2015; initial public releases in 2015

framework.comment: React 18+ required; dropped support for React 16/17 in v6.0

styling-approach.comment: Uses @ant-design/cssinjs for CSS-in-JS; v6.0+ supports zeroRuntime mode with precompiled CSS

component-model.comment: Fully styled component library based on Ant Design system, ready to use out of the box

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript with 99.6% TypeScript codebase; built-in type definitions included

ssr-compatible.comment: Explicitly supports server-side rendering; compatible with Next.js and other SSR frameworks

rsc-compatible.comment: No explicit React Server Components support documented; primarily client-side component library

design-system.comment: Ant Design system created by Ant Financial (Alibaba); enterprise-focused with four core values: Natural, Certain, Meaningful, Growing

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark theme via theme.darkAlgorithm; supports dynamic theme switching

theming-system.comment: Three-layer token system (Seed, Map, Alias tokens) with dynamic theme switching via ConfigProvider

css-variables.comment: Supports CSS variables via cssVar configuration; optional with automatic prefix handling

design-tokens.comment: Comprehensive design token system with Seed, Map, and Alias tokens; accessible via theme.getDesignToken() and useToken hook

rtl-support.comment: RTL support via CSS logical properties; built-in directional handling

component-count.comment: 67+ components across 8 categories: General (4), Layout (7), Navigation (7), Data Entry (18), Data Display (20), Feedback (11), Other (4); plus 6 Pro Components

text-input.comment: Input component with variants (outlined, filled, borderless, underlined); supports prefix/suffix and addons

textarea.comment: Input.TextArea with autoSize for automatic height adjustment; character counting support

select.comment: Select component supports single selection, searchable via showSearch property

multi-select.comment: Select with mode='multiple' for multi-selection; displays selections as tags

combobox.comment: Select with showSearch enables filtering; AutoComplete provides input-focused autocomplete; Cascader for hierarchical selection

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with single and group support

number-input.comment: InputNumber with increment/decrement controls; supports min/max, precision, formatting, and various input variants

tag-input.comment: Select with mode='tags' allows users to create custom tags; supports tokenSeparators for automatic tag splitting

pin-input.comment: No dedicated PIN/OTP input component found in documentation

color-picker.comment: ColorPicker component available in Data Entry section

date-picker.comment: DatePicker with multiple picker types (date, week, month, quarter, year); supports showTime for datetime selection

time-picker.comment: TimePicker available as separate component; also accessible via DatePicker's showTime property

date-range-picker.comment: RangePicker for date range selection; supports all picker types and time selection

file-upload.comment: Upload component with preview functionality; supports picture thumbnails and custom preview for various file formats

dropzone.comment: Upload component supports drag-and-drop interaction; users can drag files to upload area

rating-input.comment: Rate component for star rating input

input-groups.comment: Input with addonBefore/addonAfter for addons; Space.Compact recommended for modern grouped input styles

input-with-dropdown.comment: Input supports prefix/suffix and addons; can be combined with Select or Dropdown for attached dropdowns

button-groups.comment: Button groups via Space.Compact or Button.Group pattern; Segmented component for toggle-style button groups

split-button.comment: Split button pattern available via Button with Dropdown combination; documentation suggests grouping operations into Dropdown

table.comment: Basic table for displaying structured data in rows and columns

data-table.comment: Table supports sorting (single and multi-column), filtering (single/multiple/tree-based), pagination, row selection, column grouping, and editable cells

virtual-infinite-list.comment: Table supports virtual scrolling via 'virtual' property; List supports virtualization via @rc-component/virtual-list and infinite scroll via react-infinite-scroll-component (Note: List component is deprecated and will be replaced by Listy with built-in virtual scrolling)

tree-view.comment: Tree component with drag-and-drop support, expandable nodes; Table supports tree data via children field

list-view.comment: List component available (deprecated; to be replaced by Listy in next major version)

tag-chip-pill.comment: Tag component for labels; removable and clickable variants

timeline.comment: Timeline component for vertical event timelines

calendar.comment: Calendar component for month/week calendar views (display, not just picker)

toast-notification.comment: Message component for lightweight auto-dismissing notifications (top center, 1.5-3s); Notification component for more persistent alerts

progress-bar.comment: Progress component with linear bar variant

empty-state.comment: Empty component for empty content areas; Result component for operation feedback (success, error, 404, 403, 500)

modal-dialog.comment: Modal component for centered overlay dialogs

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer component for slide-in panels from edges

popover.comment: Popover component for floating content anchored to trigger

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown component for action menus; Menu component supports dropdown and submenu patterns

context-menu.comment: Menu component designed for navigation with click/hover interactions; no dedicated right-click context menu support documented

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette (⌘K style) component found in documentation

stepper.comment: Steps component for multi-step process indicators

navigation-menu.comment: Menu component for site navigation with dropdown submenus

sidebar.comment: Layout.Sider component with collapsing functionality; responsive behavior via breakpoints

bottom-navigation.comment: No dedicated mobile-style bottom navigation bar component found; would need to be built using Layout components

grid.comment: Grid component for CSS grid layouts

stack.comment: Space component for spacing between inline elements; Flex component for flexbox-based vertical/horizontal stacking without wrappers

container.comment: Layout component as main wrapper; Layout.Content for content areas

aspect-ratio.comment: No dedicated aspect ratio component found in documentation

collapsible.comment: Collapse component for expandable/collapsible content sections

resizable.comment: No standalone resizable panel component; Splitter provides resizable split panes but not general resizability

splitter.comment: Splitter component for resizable split panes (added in v5.21.0)

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations documented; users integrate third-party editors as needed

code-editors.comment: No official code editor integrations documented; users integrate Monaco, CodeMirror, etc. as needed

chart-libraries.comment: Ant Design Charts available as separate product: 'A set of high-quality React chart components out of the box'

form-libraries.comment: Built-in form management with Form component, Form.useForm() hook, and FormInstance API; no external form library integrations documented

animation-libraries.comment: Uses @rc-component/motion for transitions and animations; no external animation library integrations documented

icon-libraries.comment: @ant-design/icons package with SVG icons (since v3.9.0); supports custom SVG and iconfont.cn integration

date-libraries.comment: Uses dayjs v1.11.11 as the date library; lightweight alternative to moment.js

aria-compliant.comment: 191 open accessibility issues including missing ARIA attributes; efforts ongoing but not fully compliant

keyboard-navigation.comment: Multiple open issues regarding keyboard navigation gaps in core components (Splitter, Table, etc.)

screen-reader-tested.comment: No evidence of systematic screen reader testing; issues indicate screen reader problems with inputs and semantic labeling

focus-management.comment: Accessibility issues suggest incomplete focus management implementation

wcag-level.comment: No WCAG compliance level documented; 191 open a11y issues suggest incomplete compliance

accessibility-rating.comment: Rating: 2/5 (basic). Some ARIA attributes present but 191 open issues show significant gaps in keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and WAI-ARIA compliance. Repository has a11y_status_checks_ruleset but implementation needs improvement. Reactive rather than proactive accessibility approach.

bundle-size-full.comment: Full bundle approximately 380.80 KB gzipped when using 20+ components with tree-shaking (1.25 MB minified)

bundle-size-core.comment: No minimal core bundle; tree-shakeable so bundle size varies by components imported

tree-shakeable.comment: Tree-shakeable in v5+ with Vite and modern bundlers; automatic with ES modules; can reduce bundle size up to 80%

zero-runtime.comment: zeroRuntime mode available in v6.0+ precompiles styles into antd.css, eliminating runtime style injection

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be lazy loaded on demand via ES module imports and code splitting

documentation-quality.comment: Rating: 5/5 (excellent). Comprehensive docs with interactive code boxes, detailed API tables with types/defaults, extensive guides (theming, SSR, migration), design specifications, Pro Components ecosystem, multiple playground integrations (CodePen, CodeSandbox), and well-organized component categorization across 8 sections

interactive-docs.comment: Live component demos embedded in documentation with editable code boxes; exportable to CodePen, CodeSandbox, and other playgrounds

storybook.comment: No official Storybook available; community resources exist (@storybook/preset-ant-design) but not maintained by Ant Design team

figma-kit.comment: Official free Figma kit 'Ant Design Open Source' available on Figma Community; multiple version-specific kits (v5.9.4, v5.28); third-party premium kit at antforfigma.com

cli-generator.comment: No dedicated CLI tool for Ant Design; standard npm install and import; some setup guides for integration with Create React App and Vite

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 2,166,171 weekly downloads (npm trends); alternative source reports 1,406,023 (Socket.dev); measured as of December 2024

commercial-support.comment: No commercial support or enterprise tier; fully open source under MIT license; Ant Design Pro also MIT licensed and free

style-override.comment: Multiple override methods: className (with :where() low specificity), style prop, CSS variables via cssVar config, theme tokens, and @layer directive for cascade control

compound-components.comment: Extensive use of compound components: Input.TextArea, Form.Item, Layout.Header/Sider/Content/Footer, Menu.Item, Select modes, etc.

render-props.comment: Render props/functions available in many components: Select (optionRender, tagRender), Table (customizable cell rendering), Upload, Form.Item, etc.

slots.comment: React-based library; does not use Vue/Svelte-style named slots pattern (uses props and children instead)

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled mode; styled component library by design. zeroRuntime mode precompiles CSS but components still include styles
